title: Tetris
hint: 떨어지는 블록을 맞춰 줄을 없애는 전설의 퍼즐
description: Colorful geometric blocks fall from the top of the screen; the player rotates and positions them to form solid horizontal lines that disappear.

title: Dig Dug
hint: 땅을 파고 적을 펌프로 부풀려 터뜨리는 지하 액션
description: A character with a pump digs through dirt tunnels, inflating enemy monsters until they pop while avoiding fire-breathing dragons.

title: Asteroids
hint: 소행성을 부수고 UFO를 격추하는 벡터 그래픽 슈팅
description: A small triangular ship rotates and shoots through a field of drifting asteroids and occasional UFOs in black space.

title: Defender
hint: 횡스크롤로 외계인에게 납치된 인질을 구하는 슈팅
description: A fast spaceship flies horizontally over a mountainous landscape, shooting aliens and rescuing falling humanoids before they hit the ground.

title: Q*bert
hint: 계단 피라미드를 점프하며 타일 색을 바꾸는 캐릭터
description: A round orange creature with a trunk hops on a pyramid of cubes, changing their color while avoiding snakes and other enemies.
